name: @smallphone/standalone-diary
description: Source-first standalone SmallPhone Memo app with native Node HTTP, SQLite storage, CLI, and plain web UI.

scripts.check: node --check ./src/paths.js && node --check ./src/seed-data.js && node --check ./src/domain.js && node --check ./src/storage.js && node --check ./src/service.js && node --check ./src/http-app.js && node --check ./src/server.js && node --check ./src/cli.js && node --check ./public/app.js
